question_np: Nepal मा सबैभन्दा पहिले cyber crime law कहिले आयो?
explanation_np: Nepal को पहिलो cyber law: Electronic Transaction Act 2063 BS (2006 AD)।

question_np: Digital signature Nepal मा कसले issue गर्छ?
options_np: Controller of Certification Authority (CCA) — under MOICS
explanation_np: Digital signature: Controller of Certification Authority (CCA) under Ministry of Information and Communication।

options_np: VAT applicable — digital services, online sales। IRD: ird.gov.np
explanation_np: E-commerce: VAT applicable। Digital services tax evolving। IRD: ird.gov.np।

options_np: Criminal Code + ETA — false statements online। Court case possible
explanation_np: Online defamation: Criminal Code 2074 + ETA 2063। False damaging statements — legal action।

options_np: Others को brand name domain register गरेर sell गर्ने
explanation_np: Cybersquatting = brand/celebrity names domain register गरेर profit seek — IP violation।

question_np: Fake news defamation Nepal मा remedy?
options_np: Civil defamation case + Criminal complaint + platform report
explanation_np: Defamation remedy: civil damages, criminal complaint, platform content removal request।

options_np: Individual Privacy Act 2018 — unauthorized personal data use। Court action
explanation_np: Privacy violation: Individual Privacy Act 2018। Court मा civil case file।

options_np: Privacy Act + sector-specific regulations। Consent required
explanation_np: Biometric data: Individual Privacy Act 2018 + sector regulations। Explicit consent required।

options_np: Copyright, defamation, fraud — evolving legal framework
explanation_np: AI content: copyright ownership unclear, defamation risk, fraud potential — Nepal law evolving।

options_np: Fake identity verification, unauthorized biometric collection
explanation_np: Facial recognition fraud: fake KYC, unauthorized biometric data. Privacy Act + report to authorities।

question_np: Nepal को banking sector fraud trend?
options_np: Mobile banking fraud, phishing बढ्दैछ — awareness critical
explanation_np: Nepal banking fraud: mobile banking, phishing, SIM swap increasing। NRB awareness campaigns।

options_np: Under-regulation, fund misuse, Ponzi schemes — DoC reform ongoing
explanation_np: Cooperative issues: inadequate regulation, fund misuse cases। DoC: doc.gov.np regulate।

options_np: Insider trading, price manipulation, fake tips — SEBON regulate
explanation_np: NEPSE fraud: insider trading, manipulation। SEBON: sebon.gov.np regulate। Report suspicious।

options_np: Non-public material information use गरेर trading — illegal
explanation_np: Insider trading = non-public confidential info use गरेर profit — SEBON Act अन्तर्गत illegal।

options_np: Unusual volume + price movement without news — SEBON report
explanation_np: Price manipulation: unusual volume/price without fundamental news। SEBON: sebon.gov.np report।

options_np: Strong password + 2FA + CDSC Nepal portal monitoring
explanation_np: Demat security: CDSC Nepal portal strong password, 2FA, regular activity check।

options_np: Social media/Telegram tips verify — SEBON licensed analysts मात्र trust
explanation_np: Stock tips: SEBON licensed research analysts मात्र trust। Social media tips = pump and dump risk।

options_np: Fake NAV, unauthorized redemption — SEBON registered funds मात्र
explanation_np: Mutual fund: SEBON registered funds मात्र invest। Unauthorized: SEBON report।

options_np: sebon.gov.np मा registered brokers list — broker number verify
explanation_np: SEBON: sebon.gov.np मा licensed brokers/dealers list। Broker number verify।

options_np: Fake rights offer, fund misuse — SEBON prospectus verify
explanation_np: Rights issue: SEBON approved prospectus verify। Fake rights offer: SEBON report।

options_np: Fake hallmark, purity fraud, overcharging — certified jeweler, hallmark verify
explanation_np: Gold fraud: hallmark verify, certified jeweler बाट किन्नुस्, receipt लिनुस्।

options_np: Nepal Bureau of Standards (NBSM) hallmark — purity certify गर्छ
explanation_np: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM) ले gold hallmark standards set गर्छ।

options_np: NBSM certified, purity verify, authorized dealer — safe investment
explanation_np: Silver: NBSM certified purity, authorized dealers बाट किन्नुस्। Receipt अनिवार्य।

options_np: Fake gemstones, overvaluation — certified gemologist, certificate verify
explanation_np: Gem fraud: certified gemologist evaluation, GIA/IGI certificate verify। Large purchase = expert opinion।

options_np: Fake antiques, illegal export — Department of Archaeology verify
explanation_np: Antique fraud: Department of Archaeology verification। Nepal antiques export illegal without permit।

options_np: Fake artwork, forged signatures — provenance, expert authentication
explanation_np: Art fraud: provenance documentation, expert authentication, purchase from reputable galleries।

options_np: Authentication certificate, expert opinion, provenance documentation
explanation_np: Collectibles: authentication certificate, independent expert opinion, clear provenance।

options_np: Fake entry tickets, unauthorized guides, donation fraud — official counters मात्र
explanation_np: Heritage sites: official ticket counters, licensed guides (NTB), official donation boxes।

options_np: Fake temple trustees, donation misuse — registered temples, official banks
explanation_np: Temple donation: registered temples, bank accounts (not cash to individuals)।

options_np: Fake religious leaders, miracle claims, donation fraud — verify credentials
explanation_np: Religious fraud: fake claims of miraculous powers, unauthorized religious organizations।

options_np: Unauthorized water use, permit fraud — Department of Water Resources
explanation_np: Water rights fraud: Department of Water Resources and Irrigation मा complaint।

options_np: NEA (Nepal Electricity Authority) को नाममा fake fees — NEA directly contact
explanation_np: Electricity fraud: NEA मा directly verify। Fake NEA officials: Police + NEA report।
Nepal Electricity Authority: 1199 (toll-free customer service)।

options_np: Fake NTC/Ncell agents, unauthorized fees — official offices directly
explanation_np: Telecom fraud: NTC/Ncell official offices directly। Fake agents: Telecom companies + Police report।

options_np: Short weight, fake cylinders — NOC authorized dealers, weight check
explanation_np: Gas fraud: NOC authorized dealers मात्र, cylinder weight check (stamped weight verify)।
NOC = Nepal Oil Corporation। Petroleum products (petrol, diesel, gas) distribute।

options_np: Fake permits, unauthorized construction — Municipality/DDC verify
explanation_np: Building permit: Municipality/Rural Municipality directly verify। Fake permits: Local government + Police।

options_np: Fake EIA/IEE certificates — Ministry of Forests and Environment verify
explanation_np: Environmental clearance: Ministry of Forests and Environment verify। Fake certs: Ministry + CIAA।

options_np: Illegal mining, fake permits — Department of Mines and Geology
explanation_np: Mining fraud: Department of Mines and Geology, CIAA report।

options_np: Fake forest clearance certificates — Department of Forests
explanation_np: Forest clearance fraud: Department of Forests र CIAA report।

options_np: Fake degrees, exam fraud, ghost schools — NEB, TU, MoE report
explanation_np: Education fraud: fake degrees, exam cheating, non-functional schools। NEB, TU, MoE: moe.gov.np।

options_np: University directly, UGC Nepal, Tribhuvan University verification
explanation_np: Degree verify: University directly, UGC Nepal (ugcnepal.edu.np), TU (tuexam.edu.np)।

options_np: University Grants Commission — higher education regulate
explanation_np: UGC = University Grants Commission Nepal। Higher education institutions regulate।

options_np: Fake marksheets, result manipulation — NEB: neb.gov.np verify
explanation_np: SLC/SEE fraud: NEB (National Examination Board): neb.gov.np मा official result verify।

options_np: National Examination Board — SEE, grade 11-12 exams
explanation_np: NEB = National Examination Board Nepal। SEE (SLC), grade 11-12 national examinations।

options_np: Fake vocational certificates — CTEVT: ctevt.org.np verify
explanation_np: CTEVT certificates: ctevt.org.np मा verify। Fake certs: CTEVT + Police report।

options_np: Fake lawyer certificates — Nepal Bar Council verify
explanation_np: Lawyer verification: Nepal Bar Council (nepalbar.org.np) मा registered advocates verify।
NEC = Nepal Engineering Council। Licensed engineers verify: nec.gov.np।

options_np: Teacher Service Commission (TSC) — government school teachers
explanation_np: Government school teachers: TSC license required। tsc.gov.np।

options_np: Ghost schools, fake results — District Education Office, MoE report
explanation_np: Fake schools: District Education Office र Ministry of Education मा report।

options_np: NHB (Nepal Housing Bank), commercial banks — home loans available
explanation_np: Housing finance: NHB, commercial banks — home loans। NRB guidelines follow।

options_np: Overvaluation, fake documents, ghost property — bank, legal counsel
explanation_np: Home loan fraud: property independent valuation, legal title search, licensed lawyer।

options_np: Housing cooperatives exist — DoC registered, member-owned
explanation_np: Housing cooperatives: DoC registered। Member savings pool — housing loans।

options_np: Real Estate Regulatory Authority — being developed
explanation_np: Nepal मा RERA (Real Estate Regulatory Authority) अझ fully established भएको छैन — developing।

options_np: Apartment Ownership Act — apartment rights, common areas regulate
explanation_np: Nepal को Apartment Ownership Act ले condominiums/apartments regulate।

options_np: House Rent Act — tenant protection, eviction process
explanation_np: House Rent Act Nepal: tenant rights — notice period, rent increase limits, eviction process।

options_np: Legal process required — District Court, legal aid available
explanation_np: Illegal eviction: District Court मा injunction। Legal Aid for tenants।
Property tax: local government (municipality/rural municipality) collect गर्छ।

question_np: Capital gains on property sale Nepal?
explanation_np: Property capital gains: 5% (10+ years), 10% (under 10 years held)। IRD: ird.gov.np।

options_np: Another person को नाममा आफ्नो property — Benami prohibition law
explanation_np: Benami: others को नाममा property — Anti-Corruption, Money Laundering laws। Prohibited।

options_np: GDP को ~25% — major economic factor, fraud prevention critical
explanation_np: Remittance = ~25% GDP। Fraud prevention: remittance workers protection critical।

options_np: Foreign Employment Welfare Fund — DoFE manage, distressed workers help
explanation_np: Foreign Employment Welfare Fund: DoFE manage। Distressed workers assistance।

options_np: Nepal Embassy staff — foreign employment problems help
explanation_np: Labor attaché: Nepal Embassies मा worker problems help। MoFA: mofa.gov.np।

options_np: Nepal Embassy, DoFE, ILO Nepal — support available
explanation_np: Foreign worker rights: Nepal Embassy directly, DoFE: 1180, ILO Nepal support।

options_np: Mandatory for foreign employment — DoFE training centers
explanation_np: Pre-departure orientation: mandatory before foreign employment। DoFE training centers।

question_np: Qatar kafala system भनेको के हो?
options_np: Employer sponsorship system — worker movement restrict गर्न सक्छ
explanation_np: Kafala = employer sponsorship system Middle East। Worker rights restrict। Reforms ongoing।

options_np: DoFE registered agency, proper documents, pre-departure training, family inform
explanation_np: Safe migration: DoFE agency, legal documents, pre-departure training, family informed, Embassy number।

options_np: MOLESS, DoFE, NGOs — reintegration programs, skills training
explanation_np: Returnee support: Ministry of Labour (MOLESS), DoFE, NGOs — reintegration, skills, enterprise।

options_np: International Labour Organization Nepal — labor rights, standards
explanation_np: ILO = International Labour Organization। Nepal office: labor rights, fair work standards।

options_np: Mandatory — life, health, accident coverage for foreign workers
explanation_np: Foreign employment: mandatory insurance (life, health, accident)। DoFE ensure garchha।

options_np: Fake environmental certificates, illegal logging, pollution — MOFE report
explanation_np: Environmental fraud: Ministry of Forests and Environment (MOFE) + CIAA report।

options_np: Fake carbon credits, unverified projects — international standards verify
explanation_np: Carbon credit: VCS/Gold Standard verification। Nepal projects: MOFE oversight।

options_np: Fake eco-labels, greenwashing — NTB certified operators verify
explanation_np: Ecotourism fraud: greenwashing, fake certifications। NTB: ntb.gov.np certified operators।

options_np: Illegal — National Parks Act। DNPWC + Police report
explanation_np: Wildlife trafficking: Department of National Parks and Wildlife Conservation + Nepal Police।

options_np: Forest Act violation — Department of Forests + CIAA
explanation_np: Illegal logging: Department of Forests र CIAA: 1113 report।

options_np: NARC या authorized body certification verify — fake labels: DoC report
explanation_np: Organic certification: NARC/authorized body issued certificates verify। Fake: DoC report।

options_np: Factory waste, fake treatment — MOFE, local government report
explanation_np: Water pollution: Ministry of Forests/Environment + local government + Nepal Police।

options_np: Fake emission tests, industrial violation — MOFE + DoE report
explanation_np: Air pollution: Department of Environment + MOFE। Vehicle emission fraud: DOTM।

options_np: Illegal dumping, chemical fraud — MOFE + local government
explanation_np: Soil contamination: MOFE, local government, agriculture department मा report।

options_np: Fake solar subsidies, substandard equipment — AEPC + CIAA
explanation_np: Renewable fraud: AEPC (Alternative Energy Promotion Centre) + CIAA: 1113।

options_np: Unauthorized fundraising, fund misuse — Election Commission report
explanation_np: Political donation fraud: Election Commission Nepal: 01-4770680 report।

options_np: SWC + CIAA + Auditor General — fund accountability
explanation_np: NGO fund misuse: SWC: swc.org.np, CIAA: 1113, Office of Auditor General report।

options_np: Fund diversion, fake projects — MOFE, MOFAGA, Auditor General
explanation_np: Foreign aid fraud: MOFAGA (Ministry of Federal Affairs), Auditor General, CIAA report।

options_np: Fake retirees, fund misuse — CGAS, SSDF, Auditor General
explanation_np: Pension fraud: CGAS (Civil Administration Pension), SSDF report। Auditor General oversight।

options_np: Fake eligibility, duplicate claims — SSF Nepal + local government
explanation_np: Social security fraud: SSF (Social Security Fund) Nepal + local government report।

options_np: Social Security Fund — workers social security manage
explanation_np: SSF = Social Security Fund Nepal। Workers (formal sector) social security benefits manage।

options_np: Government services time limit, quality standard define गर्छ
explanation_np: Citizens Charter: government offices ले services delivery time, standards publicly post गर्नुपर्छ।

options_np: Most government agencies — complaints committee, ombudsman office
explanation_np: Grievance: government agencies — complaints committee। National Vigilance Centre (NVC) पनि।

options_np: Prime Minister's Office under — government fraud/corruption monitor
explanation_np: NVC = National Vigilance Centre under PMO। Government fraud, waste, abuse monitor।
Nepal Constitution: Lokpal provision exists। Implementation/establishment ongoing।

question_np: Digital divide र fraud vulnerability Nepal?
options_np: Digital literacy gap = fraud vulnerability। Rural, elderly, illiterate most at risk
explanation_np: Digital divide: rural/elderly/illiterate = higher fraud risk। Digital literacy programs critical।

options_np: Critical for fake news, fraud identification — education system integration needed
explanation_np: Media literacy: fake news, misinformation identify गर्न। School curriculum integration important।

options_np: Collective awareness, reporting culture, neighborhood watch — effective prevention
explanation_np: Community vigilance: collective awareness, normalized reporting, peer education — effective fraud prevent।

options_np: Critical — digital natives but fraud vulnerable। School programs, social media
explanation_np: Youth awareness: school programs, social media campaigns, peer education — next generation protect।

options_np: Special awareness programs needed — family, community, government support
explanation_np: Senior fraud: family vigilance, community support, simplified fraud awareness — vulnerable population।

options_np: Marriage fraud, trafficking, domestic financial control — specific vulnerabilities
explanation_np: Women specific: marriage fraud, trafficking, financial control. महिला आयोग: 1145 support।

options_np: Specific vulnerabilities — benefit fraud targeting, exploitation. Extra protection needed
explanation_np: PWD: benefit fraud, exploitation targeting। National Federation of the Disabled Nepal support।

question_np: Rural vs Urban fraud patterns Nepal?
options_np: Rural: employment, land, local. Urban: digital, investment, online — different prevention needs
explanation_np: Rural fraud: employment, land, local fraudsters। Urban: digital, cyber, investment fraud।

question_np: Fraud psychology — why people fall victim?
options_np: Cognitive biases, emotional manipulation, social pressure, urgency, authority — multiple factors
explanation_np: Fraud victims: cognitive biases (anchoring, confirmation), emotional manipulation, social proof, authority, urgency।

question_np: Fraud reporting culture Nepal मा improve गर्न?
options_np: Shame reduction, anonymity options, visible success stories, easy process — community change
explanation_np: Reporting culture: shame reduce गर्ने, anonymous options, success stories share, simple reporting process।
